title: About — Kurtis Rogers
metaDescription: Learn about Kurtis Rogers — background, technology interests, and career experience.

technology.heading: Technology
technology.body: I work primarily with TypeScript, Node.js, and modern web frameworks. I'm experienced with server-rendered applications, REST APIs, and building accessible front-end interfaces. I value tools that are simple, well-documented, and battle-tested.

career.heading: Career
career.body: Over the years I've contributed to products across startups and established teams — from greenfield builds to large-scale refactors. I thrive in collaborative environments where quality, mentorship, and continuous improvement are shared values.
